title: File:Donna Summer (1980 ABC special "Bad Girl" promo photo).jpg
creator: Distributed by ABC . Photographer uncredited and unknown.
credit: * Original source: Originally published as part of a composite publicity photo by American Broadcasting Company (ABC) in mid-to-late January 1980. Scans of the original photo (front and back) can be see at WorthPoint . Immediate source: Scan via @mcriahcarey on Twitter. Retouched by uploader; see upload history below for unretouched original.
description: American singer Donna Summer in a publicity photo promoting The Donna Summer Special , which premiered on ABC on January 27, 1980. The photo comes from a segment of the special in which Summer performed the song " Bad Girls " live on a soundstage for a studio audience.
